title: Integrate answer compliance grounding
goal: Connect required-reading and answer-compliance declarations to the grounding verdict without claiming actual reading or semantic correctness.

acceptance.assertion: Task profiles determine required and recommended evidence for the checked answer declaration.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Missing required evidence yields fail while missing recommended evidence yields warn.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Freshness, availability and non-claims are carried into the verdict.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The integration states that declaration compliance does not prove the agent actually read or understood the evidence.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #933: answer grounding verifier integrates Required Reading task profiles and carries caveats/non-claims into verdicts.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t003-task-profile: verify_answer_grounding_for_task_profile derives required/recommended roles from default_required_reading_protocol().
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t003-no-reading-proof: Proof/self-review and verdict does_not_establish keep actual_reading_proven/repo_understood as non-claims.

checks: Lenskit PR #933 CI all green before merge
